---
title: "Anne Mary Buston"
---

## Anne Mary Buston

**Dates:** (1824/5-26 Oct 1895)

**Maiden name:** (Dennis)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Roger Buston

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 11th [1886]
- Letter from Easter day [5 April 1885]
- Letter from April 1st [after 1875]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
